findings.description: The class name `jQuery` is listed in the s1 section content as the class for jQuery拡張セレクタ (shown as `jQuery`（nablarch/ui/selector）), but `jQuery` is not present as a standalone hint. Per V4, PascalCase/known class names appearing in content should be included as hints.
findings.source_evidence: Source: `jQuery拡張セレクタ(nablarch/ui/selector)` linking to `classes/jQuery.html`. Knowledge s1 content renders this as `jQuery`（nablarch/ui/selector）, but hints only include `jQuery拡張セレクタ`, not `jQuery` itself.
